Background.key_experience: Losing a significant portion of their modest savings during the 2021 meme-stock craze by following a viral Reddit thread, which resulted in a habit of obsessively watching trends without ever taking the lead again.

Current_State.recent_memory: Spent my entire forty-minute lunch break scrolling through 'day in the life' vlogs of other delivery drivers to see if I was using the correct type of phone mount, eventually ordering the one that appeared in three different videos.
